hero.title: Everything for your business
hero.subtitle: List products and services, find partners and contractors, close resource gaps — through one simple platform.
hero.hint: Sign in with email and password. Then choose a role and subscribe for sellers and entrepreneurs if needed.

bento.title: Platform features
bento.subtitle: Different card sizes — Bento style: the essentials at a glance, the rest defines the structure.
bento.item1Desc: Cards with photos, prices and seller contacts. Fast search across the market.
bento.item2Desc: Describe your services or find contractors for a task.
bento.item3Desc: One or a few clicks — products from your online store into the catalog.
bento.item4Desc: Message counterparties directly, negotiate without third-party messengers.
bento.item5Desc: Save companies and build lasting connections.
bento.item6Desc: Internal currency for payments and exchanges on the platform.

howItWorks.title: How SpivDiya works
howItWorks.subtitle: Everything is designed so that even a non-technical business owner can get started in minutes.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Company name, niche, contacts and website link — all online.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Add manually or enter your shop URL — we'll pull names, photos and prices.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Chat, favourites, partner invites — no extra steps.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Registration takes about a minute. Then — profile, role and working with the catalog.
